tasks.title: CLI create-if-missing seeds + install tests (AC6)
tasks.acceptance: bin/cli.js create-if-missing: if root .cursorrules missing write minimal English pointer to AGENTS.md; if root CHANGELOG.md missing write stub compatible with changelog skill template; if either exists skip (log) never overwrite. Hooked alongside ensureSharedConsumerArtifacts / install completion so Full/workflow installs get seeds. README install notes document optional accompaniment. test/test-install.js asserts create-once and second run does not clobber. No secrets in seeds. Do not overwrite consumer-owned shared/config.json, stack.md, MEMORY.md, memory/*. Prefer documenting seeds in README (and CLI help) — do not edit setup.md here (owned by T1).
